# CWE-434: dangerous upload extension stored and served for execution.
lang: go
file: CWE-434-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func UploadAvatar(c *gin.Context) {
	file, err := c.FormFile("avatar")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	dest := filepath.Join("/var/www/static/avatars", file.Filename)
	if err := c.SaveUploadedFile(file, dest); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
		return
	}
	c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, "/static/avatars/"+file.Filename)
}
